name: Elemental Channeling - Thunderburst
description: Creatures of your choice within 30 feet make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 2d10 + your cleric level thunder damage, is pushed up to 10 feet directly away from you, and is deafened until the end of your next turn. On a success, it takes half damage and is not pushed or deafened. The ground in a 10-foot radius centered on you becomes a reverberating zone and counts as difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.
